scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/shared build && pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/server build && pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/web build && node scripts/copy-web.mjs && node scripts/copy-package.mjs
scripts.publish: pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/shared build && pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/server build && pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/shared publish && pnpm --filter @agent-spaces/server publish
